scenarios.query: Analyze Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL) over the next 12 months. Focus on defence capex and ministry ordering cadence, order-book composition (radars/communication/avionics/ naval vs army/air programmes), execution risk and revenue recognition, margin drivers (mix toward platforms vs components, pricing norms), export pipeline vs geo-political constraints, working capital and receivables from PSU/defence customers, competitive positioning vs imports/private peers, and policy/indigenisation tailwinds or procurement delays. Provide base/bull/bear with rough probability weights, INR fair-value or return bands with stated assumptions, 5–7 quarterly KPIs (order intake, book-to-bill, execution/Revenue growth, EBITDA margin, receivable days) with invalidation triggers, and key events that could shift the trajectory.
